name: ag-ui
description: Plugins for working with the AG-UI protocol SDKs.

metadata.description: Plugins for working with the AG-UI protocol SDKs.

plugins.name: ag-ui-dotnet
plugins.description: Skills for building apps with the AG-UI .NET SDK: streaming chat (stateless vs hosted agents), server tools, client tools, human-in-the-loop (approvals & interrupts), shared state, multimodal messages, reasoning traces, protobuf transport, and troubleshooting.
